title: Create: Ocean
description: Survive in a world with an endless ocean, and only one island.
body:
### DISCLAIMER: We highly recommend using the built in Item Obliterator to remove either blank maps or filled maps. With the way the worlds work, buried treasure maps just crash multiplayer worlds when used normally.

Also, it may perform badly if you have hardware on the lower end. We are aware of this, but we have not found a way to fix it.

If you want to use this in a video, all we ask is that you link it somewhere.

Bambooseller:If you do decide to use it in a video, if you want to spawn a mob you can't get by spawning normally I say it is ok to use /spawn and won't count it as cheating :)

bambooseller:edit i may or may not have deleted the item obliterator from the modpack so i suggest that you download it sorry.
______________________

Welcome to Ocean Create! This modpack has one goal for you: survive on an ocean only world with nothing but a single island. Can you do it?  At first, this modpack was only for me and my friends, but we found it so fun, we wanted to share it with other people! See how far you can get with nothing but a single island, and your knowledge of Minecraft and its mods, and have fun!

- World with only ocean and one island
- Lively ocean full of new creatures
- A meteor somewhere in the world with mysterious technology
- All features of Create
- Estrogen 
- Ore Excavation drills
- A nostalgic realm of Twilight
- Play with your friends with the help of Essential
- Fully functional natural systems such as moss and weathering
- Multiple planets
- and more!
